confirmed_failures.root_cause: LRU eviction logic doesn't properly track access order - get() updates access but put() ignores it
confirmed_failures.symptom: Wrong item evicted after get() + put() sequence

confirmed_failures.root_cause: _load_config() missing encoding='utf-8' that save_config() has, causing BOM issues
confirmed_failures.symptom: String comparison fails after JSON save/load despite identical print output

confirmed_failures.root_cause: Three bugs: (1) get() returns expired without deleting, (2) cleanup() modifies dict during iteration, (3) size() counts expired
confirmed_failures.symptom: Cache grows unbounded, iteration crashes, expired entries persist

hard_task_failures.name: Event System Race
hard_task_failures.root_cause: events.py iterates self.subscribers directly while handlers unsubscribe during iteration

agent_attempts.action: Fixed processor.py for loop with copy()
Fixed events.py to iterate over list(self.subscribers)

hard_task_failures.remaining_issue: Tests still fail due to shared global emitter state between tests

hard_task_failures.name: Template Engine
hard_task_failures.root_cause: Three bugs: (1) default_filter treats 0 as falsy, (2) renderer applies filters but doesn't use result, (3) regex matches literal braces
hard_task_failures.remaining_issue: One test has incorrect assertion (test bug, not code bug)

hard_task_failures.name: Middleware Chain Short-Circuit
hard_task_failures.root_cause: rate_limit_mw.py raises exception instead of returning 429 response
hard_task_failures.agent_action: Fixed code correctly (changed raise to return Response(429))
hard_task_failures.remaining_issue: Tests contradict each other - some expect exception, some expect 429

hard_task_failures.name: State Machine Transition
hard_task_failures.root_cause: execute_transition() checks guard AFTER state change instead of BEFORE
hard_task_failures.remaining_issue: Two test failures due to rule shadowing in get_rule()

multiple_interacting_bugs.pattern: All bugs must be fixed together

test_design_issues.pattern: Tests don't agree on expected behavior

global_state.pattern: Shared state between tests causes interference
